topic: Context Window Management — How do you handle 10M token context across 50-turn agentic conversations without hitting limits? Summarization loops, memory compression, retrieval augmentation
question_text: How would you design a robust system to manage 10M token context in a 50-turn agentic conversation?
hook_text: Facing 10M token context limits in agentic AI? Here's how to master context window management on Google Cloud.
cta_text: Save this for your next Generative AI system design interview!

answer_sections.title: Token Window Strategy
answer_sections.text:
Utilize Gemini 2.5 Pro
for initial large context.
Prioritize critical turns,
discard less relevant.
Maintain conversation flow.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Start with Gemini 2.5 Pro. Prioritize critical conversation turns and manage context by intelligently discarding less relevant information.

answer_sections.title: Dynamic Context Compaction
answer_sections.text:
Implement summarization loops
with Gemini 3.1 Pro.
Compress memory for long
conversations and context.
Reduces token usage.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Dynamically compact context using summarization loops with Gemini 3.1 Pro. This effectively compresses memory, reducing token limits.

answer_sections.title: Retrieval Augmented Generation
answer_sections.text:
Augment context with RAG
via Vertex AI Agent Engine.
Retrieve external data
from vector database.
Enhance knowledge base.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Enhance agentic conversations with Retrieval Augmented Generation through Vertex AI Agent Engine, pulling external data from vector databases.
